workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.name: Name
workspaces.nameInvalid: Enter a name between 1 and 200 characters.
workspaces.deleteConfirm: Delete this workspace? All chatrooms inside will be removed.
workspaces.emptyDescription: Create a workspace to organize your chatrooms.

chatrooms.title: Chatrooms
chatrooms.nameInvalid: Enter a name between 1 and 200 characters.
chatrooms.deleteConfirm: Delete chatroom? All messages will be permanently removed.
chatrooms.emptyDescription: Create a chatroom and bind agents to start conversations.

chatroom.agentFailed: The agent run failed. Please try again.
chatroom.exportQueued: Export queued ({jobId}). Download will be ready shortly.
chatroom.editFailed: Could not edit — it may be past the 5-minute window or changed elsewhere.
chatroom.deleteConfirm: Delete this message? This removes it for everyone and cannot be undone.

settings.title: Chatroom Settings
settings.name: Name
settings.allowOrgMembersDesc: Any member of the organization can join.
settings.allowProjectMembersDesc: Any member of this project can join.
settings.allowProjectOwnersOnlyDesc: Only project owners can access. Overrides member flags.
settings.allowGuestLinksDesc: Anyone with the link can join as a guest.
settings.guestLinkHelp: Share this permanent link to invite guests:
settings.deleteDesc: Permanently remove this chatroom and all messages. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirm: Delete this chatroom and all its messages? This cannot be undone.
settings.compactDesc: Merge old messages to reduce storage. This action cannot be undone.
settings.compactConfirm: Compact chatroom history? Older messages will be merged. This cannot be undone.
settings.noAgents: No agents in this project yet.
settings.versionConflict: This chatroom changed elsewhere. Review your edits and save again.

guest.title: Join Chatroom
guest.error: Failed to join. The link may be invalid or expired.
guest.invalidToken: This link is no longer valid. The chatroom may have been deleted or guest access may have been disabled.
guest.networkError: Could not connect. Please check your connection and try again.
